If user requires notification then we can always ask them to select checkbox.

It should be possible to change the content of the e-mail notification sent by Process Governance.

Request Details: We would like to request the inclusion of a functionality that allows users to exclude weekends and holidays when configuring reminders and escalations in Process Governance. Currently, it is only possible to include reminders and escalation times in days, without considering weekends and holidays.
Use Case: This feature would be particularly helpful in scenarios where tasks within a workflow have strict deadlines and it is necessary to ensure timely completion. For example, in a customer onboarding process, it may be required to send a reminder to the assigned team member if a task is not completed within two working days. However, if the task is assigned on a Friday, including the intervening weekend in the calculation may cause delays and misalignment with the desired timeline.
Pain Points: The current lack of functionality to exclude weekends and holidays in reminders and escalations can lead to inefficiencies and delays in task completion. It may also result in incorrect communication of deadlines to team members, impacting overall process governance and adherence.
Benefits: By incorporating the ability to exclude weekends and holidays in reminders and escalations, Process Governance users will be able to configure more accurate and realistic timelines for task completion. This will enable better alignment with business requirements, improve efficiency, and enhance overall process governance. Task owners will receive timely reminders and escalations that consider working days, leading to smoother and more efficient workflow execution.
Overall, we believe that the addition of this functionality would be a valuable enhancement to Process Governance, ensuring more effective task management and better support for process governance needs.

By providing customers to be able to enable and disable separately notifications by their type, they would be able to customize their email notification usage due to their business needs and won't be bothered by the huge amount of emails.

Request Details:
We are requesting a feature that allows for proactive notification if emails are not successfully sent to users. This feature should provide alerts for any potential compliance issues that may arise due to non-delivery of critical communications.
Use Case:
Our organization sends important emails to our customers relating to compliance and regulatory requirements. It is crucial for us to ensure that these emails are successfully delivered and received by the intended recipients. If there are any issues with email delivery, we need to be notified in a timely manner to take appropriate action and prevent potential compliance issues.
Pain Points:
Currently, we lack visibility into whether emails are successfully delivered to users. This lack of visibility could lead to compliance issues on the customer side if important communications are not received. Without proactive notification of email delivery issues, we are at risk of non-compliance with regulatory requirements.
Benefits:
Proactive notification of email delivery issues will allow us to take immediate action to rectify any non-delivery problems.
Enhanced visibility into email delivery status will help mitigate compliance risks and ensure that critical communications reach the intended recipients.
This feature will minimize the potential for customer-side compliance issues by addressing email delivery issues in a proactive and timely manner.
